# 2026 Social Media Algorithm Mastery (fixture)

## LinkedIn
- Golden 60-minute window: substantive comments in the first hour drive reach.
- Vertical video gets 5–10x broader reach than link-only posts.
- Do not put external links in the post body.

## YouTube Shorts
- Swipe-away is the primary negative signal.
- Keep Shorts between 30–60 seconds for completion rate.

## Viral editing laws
- Hook in the first 1.5 seconds.
- Assume 85% of viewers are muted — captions required.
